name: Odd Night
short_description: You're stuck in an endlessly looping hallway, but every time you enter it, something seems to be different. Try to spot everything that isn't supposed to be there, but most of all, make sure to get out alive.
detailed_description:
Overview

Odd Night is a psychological horror game that places you in an endlessly repeating corridor in a Victorian mansion. Every time you enter the corridor, something will change. Make sure to memorize all the details of the room, so you can spot any differences once they occur.

Use the camera to take pictures of everything that seems odd. You are only allowed to take one picture per loop, so be sure to not waste it. Taking pictures of things that are supposed to be there counts as a mistake and will reset you to the start.

Test your limits

This game tries to put you in stressful situations of varying degrees. Anomalies can be small deviations in the structure of the corridor, but they can also open up completely new parts of the world or, in the worst case, even try to end your run for good.

Esacpe the loop

Every time you clear a room correctly, your current streak increases. Every mistake will reset your streak to 0. If your streak reaches a high enough count, you win the game.
